Metric: Target shareholder loan repayment
Note: Manual adjustment supplied by user for 2025.

Metric: Additional business expenses paid on personal credit card
Note: Manual adjustment supplied by user for shareholder-paid business expenses not yet reimbursed through the books.

Metric: Combined shareholder-related target (loan + personal-card expenses)
Note: Used to test whether the strict 6611/0273 transfer family fully explains the owner-related cash movement.

Metric: Gross withdrawals from business to ...0273
Note: Transfers classified by the app's Aquatech-specific 6611/0273 equity-transfer rule.

Metric: Gross returns from ...0273 back to business
Note: Offsets against the gross withdrawals in the same 6611/0273 transfer family.

Metric: Net withdrawals matched to 6611/0273 transfer family
Note: Year-end net of those internal-equity transfer movements.

Metric: Amount of target loan repayment supported by that net-withdrawal family
Note: Capped at the stated shareholder-loan repayment amount.

Metric: Support remaining after the loan repayment target
Note: Available for other shareholder-related items after allocating the first $125,000 to the stated loan repayment.

Metric: Personal-card expenses supported by remaining matched withdrawals
Note: Applies the excess 6611/0273 net withdrawals to the shareholder-paid business expenses.

Metric: Personal-card expense amount still unreimbursed after matched withdrawals
Note: Amount of the $25,000 personal-card business expense item not covered by the strict 6611/0273 transfer family.

Metric: Gap between target loan repayment and matched net withdrawals
Note: Positive gap means the current bank support is short; negative gap means the transfer family exceeds the stated loan repayment.

Metric: Shortfall against target
Note: Only populated when the transfer family is below the stated loan repayment.

Metric: Excess transfer-family support over target
Note: Only populated when the transfer family exceeds the stated loan repayment.

Metric: Amount of combined shareholder-related target supported by matched net withdrawals
Note: Capped at the combined total of the loan repayment plus shareholder-paid business expenses.

Metric: Net withdrawals after accounting for loan and personal-card expenses
Note: Negative means the combined shareholder-related target exceeds the matched net withdrawals; positive means withdrawals remain unexplained.

Metric: Unaccounted withdrawals after both items
Note: Residual unexplained withdrawals after applying the $125,000 loan repayment and $25,000 personal-card expense assumption.

Metric: Remaining unreimbursed shareholder-related amount
Note: Amount still due to the shareholder after applying all matched 6611/0273 withdrawals to the stated loan and personal-card expense items.

Metric: Peak cumulative net withdrawals during 2025
Note: Peak reached on 2025-12-30.

Metric: Date cumulative net first reached the target
Note: Target was first crossed when 405.43 of that transaction was needed.

Metric: Date cumulative net first reached the combined target
Note: Combined target was never reached by cumulative net withdrawals.

Metric: Owner Draw bank category not auto-matched
Note: Separate owner-activity bucket; left outside the strict 6611/0273 transfer family.

Metric: P&L owners equity line (cash)
Note: Book presentation only; not auto-matched to the loan without supporting entries.

Metric: P&L owners equity line (accrual)
Note: Book presentation only; not auto-matched to the loan without supporting entries.
